word: G3494 - νεανίας - neanías - neh-an-ee'-as - Young man

sections.paragraph:
- Original: νεανίας

- Transliteration: Neanias

- Phonetic: neh-an-ee'-as

- Definition:

1. a young man

- Origin: from a derivative of G3501

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: From a derivative of G3501; a youth (up to about forty years): - young man.
